message:
chore(beads): close CUAL/FCP2/FWC verification cascade (~25 beads)

Systematically verified existing implementations against acceptance
criteria and closed beads across multiple tracks:

CUAL Phase 2: qnchs.6.3-6.5, 4.3-4.4, 3.4, 5.4, 8.3-8.4, 10.2,
  13.2, 9.1, 9.3, 18.1-18.4, 18 (epic), 19.1-19.3, 12 (epic), 17.1
FCP2: 6o25.2, 6o25.2.1, 6o25.3, 6o25.3.1, 1n78.36.6
FWC: 1pjhh (fcp-cli retirement - all commands ported)

Key evidence: readiness (1004t), secretless (502t), checkpoint/replay
(634t), render (357t), access_cmd (271t), zone_scope (254t), doctor
(205t), pipeline_cond (203t), bench_cmd (189t), op_lock (170t),
undo (170t), reactive_rules (171t), json_diff (168t), gossip (42t),
source_diversity (4t), epoch_replay (67t).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
